title: Unexpected simulation behavior if `array.first()` method is included in code (not used though)

features.name: associative_array_first_method_in_procedure
features.description: Code should include an associative array with the first() method called on it within a procedural context

features.name: combinational_logic_with_array_method
features.description: Code should include combinational logic that uses an associative array with the first() method, where the method presence affects evaluation timing
features.snippet: int mem[string]; int i; always_comb begin mem.first(i); end
